video.title: Big Names Battle In The Breakaway | Giro D'Italia 2022 Stage 8 Highlights

transcript.clean_text: the bay of naples was the backdrop to stage eight of the giraffe italia a wonderful interesting design of a course taking place a day after a seventh stage that ended up with the first ever grand tour win for kunbalman he also took the leaders jersey in the king of the mountains competition but to naples 153 kilometers the first visit from the judo in nine long years only three cities have ever been visited more and they knew it was all going to be a very fast start riders on the turbo trainers with mature fonda pool one of the big favorites of the day a mini world championships if you like a world championships without the distance one long lap around outskirts of naples before four shorter laps taking in baccali and monte de prochira before returning to the center of napoli for an expected finish between the favorites who could either get it out and a breakaway or to see if the sprinters could hold on it was standing start as well mechanical problems meant that by the time we got to kilometer zero under the finish arch everybody had to stop the flag was waved but the action came thick and fast machiavelli one of the first attackers thomas against was trying to follow him and soon a group of 21 riders would be up the road it would take them 15 to 20 kilometers to consolidate that advantage quite a few teams had several riders in the break lotto sudall with three members but one of the components of the breakaway would be guillemata at four minutes and six seconds from the gc leader juan pedro lopez it meant that his team trek segafredo would have to control things at the front the intermediate sprint bought 12 points in the maya chiclamino competition for biniyam gilmai girl my one of the pre-stage favorites along with machiavonipol and it would be fonder pool who launched things with 46ks to go on the final lap of the circuit attacking on one of the climbs and taking away a small group most of the original breakaway would come back a few finding they didn't have any legs and then another move went david gabour off the front jorge arkas chasing and then two riders from lotto sudal along with one from drone upper androni giocartoli that one would be simone ravanelli he'd be the first to be distance when thomas aquint and hanan vahuka went to the front mauro schmidt behind will launch another group while pools piniam guillermo guillen mata and mateo fonda pool would be in the chase but they were over half a minute down with 26 kilometers remaining that gap c sword it went up and down yo-yoing along with the front quartet still managing to keep a gap inside the last 10ks with seven and a half ks to go there was action from the peloton too leonard kemler 38 seconds behind in second place hoping to take the pink jersey but the pink jersey was having none of it juan pelopez defending and sticking like glue to his wheel the gap was 20 seconds with six and a half k's to go and fauna paul and gilmar went away on the final descent taking the gap down to 10 seconds in the final two kilometers it will prove to be too little too late for them however behind they tightened up their shoes they began to get ready for a four-up sprint it came to the final 250 meters and with 200 to go digent launching after the hookah controlled for the final three or four k's gabriel behind him but unable to get anywhere near jorge arkads finished third for hooker fourth cheering as thomas siegent made it thomas italia book ending a decade of brilliant breakaway wins his first big win here at the judo d'italia in 2012 on the mighty stillwheel down by the seaside in naples a decade later digent was once again a winner at the cheetah and between that moment there'd been stage wins at the welter and the tour win number 17 in the career of thomas again a very special one indeed coming three years after his last grand tour stage win at the tour de france the ghent gaboro arcas von hooker with germaine winning the sprint for fifth his fourth top five so far in the race gio martin finishing at 33 seconds and that was important with the peliton coming over at three minutes 33 three minutes back for the frenchman in the gc fuente lopez held on to the pink jersey then but mata into the top 10 in fourth place at 106. he's in a great position in front of the rest of the gc favorites led by yates in fifth as they go to blockhouse a 38-second lead then for juanpe lopez to defend over kemna but he might be looking further back the first 17 kilometers of the stage ridiculously difficult then you add in paso lanciano had a climb to blockhouse from the most difficult side the first visit since naido quintana won a few years ago possibly the hardest mountain top finish of the whole giro d'italia it's 191 kilometers for stage nine should be a blockbuster the end of the first week proper and the first big appointment in the mountains with big moves expected in the general classification the jira d'italia is live each and every day on gcn plus discovery plus and eurosport
